response.overview: Agter die Ligte is a South African musical film documenting a massive, one-night-only Afrikaans music production held on March 20, 2012, at the Coca-Cola Dome in Johannesburg. The film showcases singer-songwriter Joe Niemand alongside 900 performers, including Romanz, Coleske, and a symphony orchestra, exploring themes of faith and, specifically, faith in an unlimited God.
response.tagline: 'n Film oor Geloof in 'n Onbeperkte God
response.title: Agter die Ligte
